positive: A stylized, symmetrical celestial tapestry featuring a minimalist silhouette of a majestic deer leaping over a crescent moon. The deer is depicted in a flowing, ethereal form, surrounded by swirling nebulae patterns and constellations. Use deep indigo, shimmering gold, and matte cosmic blue tones. The overall composition should be perfectly centered and highly scalable, suitable for repeating apparel prints. High contrast, clean lines, vector art aesthetic meets modern cosmic illustration. Dramatic backlighting, perfect composition, crisp details, isolated on a clean background.
negative: blurry, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, low detail, artifacts, messy, ugly, graffiti, cropped, dirty
